content:
{Intro}
   
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm/A[/ch] [ch]Bm/A[/ch] [ch]Bm/A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]

    {Verse 1}
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
I would like to get to know if I could be [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
The kind of girl you that you could be down for[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch] 
Cuz when I look at you I feel something tell me[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
